site.title: Andrea Piscioneri — UX/UI Designer & Developer
site.description: Portfolio of Andrea Piscioneri. UX/UI designer, web designer & developer, graphic designer based in Lombardy, Italy. Digital design, brand identity and web development projects.
site.tagline: Design that thinks, code that listens.

home.heroDescription: I design interfaces, websites and digital brands. I currently work at Denani S.R.L. as UX/UI designer, and I build products with Nuxt, Next and Vue. Graduated with honors in Graphic Design (Santa Giulia) and Master's in Digital Design & Communication (LABA) 110/110 cum laude.
home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of recent work across design, development and digital branding.
home.aboutSectionBody: From my first graphic internship at MBE to my current role as UX/UI designer at Denani, I've moved across every layer of visual design and development. Today I blend research, UI, motion and code to ship products that really work.

services.title: UX/UI Design
services.body: Research, wireframes, prototypes and complete design systems.

services.title: Web Development
services.body: Nuxt, Next, Vue, React. Fast, accessible, SEO-ready websites.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.body: Naming, logo, visual system, guidelines and collateral.

services.title: 3D & Motion
services.body: Cinema 4D, Blender, motion graphics, product rendering.

services.title: Odoo & Apps
services.body: Custom Odoo modules and native mobile applications.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: All projects: digital design, development, brand and graphics.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Designer, developer, photographer. From Albino (BG), Italy — with European ambition.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: If you have a project, an idea or just a question — drop me a line.

footer.tagline: Design that thinks, code that listens.
footer.colophon: Built with Nuxt 3, TypeScript, Tailwind, GSAP & Lenis.
